# seerr_service_status (Data Source)

Get Seerr service status and version information.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `commit_tag` (String) The current commit tag of Seerr.
- `commits_behind` (Number) Number of commits behind the latest version.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `restart_required` (Boolean) Whether a restart is required.
- `update_available` (Boolean) Whether an update is available.
- `version` (String) The current version of Seerr.
